channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Tiles on the side pathway, 20th June
item.description:
Tiles/rubbish blocking side pathway to the communal bin needs to be cleared/collected. Its been there for weeks.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Linscott Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish bags dumped, 20th June
item.description:
Black rubbish bags dumped on the side street pavement.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Linscott Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Vandalism, 20th June
item.description:
Vandals are out on the meadows drinking, shouting, throwing alcohol cans, they can be heard chasing wildlife, breaking something - possibly doing something to the bench or dog litter bin again. The bench in this area attracts regular anti-social behaviour, particularly late night/early hours and the bench and area are being vandalised regularly and wildlife being disturbed. It would be better if the bench were removed from this location to prevent this repeat behaviour.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ellenborough Road, North Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Furniture on street, 20th June
item.description:
Out for a few weeks

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kingsland Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Metal sheet, 20th June
item.description:
Metal sheet

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 41, Stockwell Green, Stockwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Littered steet, 20th June
item.description:
Combermere road covered in letter. Reported multiple times over months. Street constantly covered in litter

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Combermere Road, Stockwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 26 Howitt Rd, 20th June
item.description:
This young tree flowered beautifully last year and despite being regularly watered did not come into leaf this year. Buds seem to be affected by fungus and both poles have fallen out.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 26, Howitt Road, Belsize Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large sinkhole forming in middle of road, 20th June
item.description:
There is a large sinkhole formed in middle of road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ludwick Mews, New Cross Gate, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rough sleeper, 20th June
item.description:
Hi, Can we please help and move this guy on. He's sleeping rough under the tunnel. In the morning his mate joins him. Been there for a week. Public tunnel, and should feel comfortable walking through in the mornings, rather than walking past two men. Thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 23, Westmoreland Place, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Homeless people littering, 20th June
item.description:
Homeless peoples litter been here for six months or more and has been ignored

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 31, The Cut, Waterloo, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Major clean up required in this area of elcot avenue, 20th June
item.description:
Please go through and clean up all this waste that's been littered everywhere

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 32, Elcot Avenue, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
